change.diff_summary: Reduced diffusion loss weight (lam_diff=0.5) during finetuning

jury_reasoning.hypothesis: Reducing generic diffusion loss focuses LoRA on SIR-guided adaptation.

git.commit_message: pipeline: time_series_expert — Reduce diffusion loss weight in finetune (lam_diff=0.5)
